acceptance_tests: c01 install acceptance (spec section 1): on a CLEAN fixture project exactly two commands - npm install <local tarball fixture> (no registry/network) then npx cael-os-light init --fixture - after which npx cael-os-light status boots the turn spine on the bundled synthetic pack + fixture cael.os.md and prints {os_sha, packs[], head_adapter}; verified on Windows PowerShell AND POSIX sh; STUB head-adapter so the run is fully offline; expected post-init file tree diffed against the fixture

fixture manifest law (spec section 11 table): every named fixture exists at cael-os-light/fixtures/phase0/c<NN>/<class>/<fixture-id>/ per the c01-c13 grid; a named fixture missing on disk = the condition is red; declared '-' N/A cells listed in the report, not silently skipped

gate batteries (c02): A closed-world RBAC battery green incl. multi-doc MAX-restrictiveness, canonicalization, deny-if-any, declared allow-row minimums; B eligibility battery green incl. rank/cap-3/never-empty fallback + question-independence (same state => same output across questions); C open-world battery green incl. tri-state missing!=false, field-over-token, sole-discriminator hard-kill, negation, honest-fallback, precision-by-construction, PARTITIONED fixture set with valid-coverage minimum and false-refusal cap on clean rows

dual-channel zero-leak (c03): across the full deny battery the user channel carries generic id-free refusals, audit records carry resolved ids, ZERO denied content/existence in the user channel at string level; audit-write failure fails closed
refuse-without-evidence (c04): ungrounded => refusal citing missing evidence; grounded => cited answer; abstention floor holds on the decoy fixture
receipts (c05): every turn validates against the typed schema; a forced-invalid turn degrades locally (chat survives; mutation blocked) and logs
ledger isolation (c06): continuity across turns; user A can never read user B via ANY surface (adversarial probes); replayed append = single entry; restart-mid-session resumes

graded-cooper (c07): ordinary battery = ZERO second-brain calls; each configured trigger (low-confidence, permission-boundary, step-up, residual) fires on its fixture row; escalation visible in receipts; escalation-seam failure refuses rather than answers

pack loader (c08): loads the valid synthetic pack; REFUSES each of the 7 malformed variants with named errors (no-derivation, foreign-derivation, red-derivation-fixture, template-trigger-misalign, undeclared-scored-surface, undeclared-state-ref, evidence-free-broken-key-claim); unparseable pack refused; re-register no duplicate
image (c09): boots from the fixture cael.os.md; identical cached prefix across turns (stable prefix hash); SHA mismatch => refuse boot; mid-session image swap refused

eval harness (c10+c11): L1 scored-fn end-to-end report naming public scope; planted broken key quarantined ONLY via predeclared claim; L2 two-session composition proof recorded on two synthetic packs (mixed prompts; gate holds turn-to-turn; planted bleed probe caught) + provenance pack emitted

adapter conformance (c12): the conformance suite (fixed transcript replay) green on adapter #1/stub: expected tool-call/event envelopes, stable cache-prefix hash across replays, structured-output failure semantics, retry/error mapping, receipt equivalence

goal-light (c13): goal records persist across restart; illegal lifecycle transition REFUSED; relations hold across restart (blocker completion surfaces dependent); per-user goal isolation; replayed create = single record; pack-level goal templates enforced by the loader (undeclared goal writes refused)

engineering hygiene: TypeScript builds clean from a cold clone (npm ci + build); full Phase-0 test suite green offline in one command; zero client-data markers (rg scan over the package for known client identifiers empty); BUILD cooper record valid strict JSON attached via lane.py attach-build-cooper-record before ready
constraints: CONVERGE-ONLY until P0 blockers (0576/0631) verified AND Kajima co-converge locks the spec
build fires via RADIO contract, never solo

hard_rejects: prose-parsed routing/actions anywhere; UI code in any scoring path (headless scored surfaces only)
any answer path bypassing the gate engine; second-brain call on the ordinary hot path; a model as its own only checker
public-eval-derived constants without a threshold_derivations[] record; P035 special-cased anywhere; public scores reported as hidden expectations
client data anywhere in repo/image/fixtures (SYNTHETIC packs only); secrets in receipts; factory machinery (courts/evals-governance/compiler/source) inside the shipped dep
provider-locked names or per-model prompt forks (role/contract naming only; head-adapter under the fixed role contract)
silent empty recommendation (never-empty fallback law); missing token treated as false (tri-state is engine-native); test-time broken-key quarantine without a predeclared broken_key_claims record

writes outside the scope fence: zero writes to cael.agent.os/** (beyond lane-normal goal/lane state), v3/**, canon/routing docs, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .os_image.json; no generated boot artifact riding the diff
markdown cooper record; self-judge-close; prose completion claims (job.py done + judge on disk only)
foreground full-suite runs in the lane shell (detached-to-file only); npm network installs during acceptance runs (local tarball + offline stub adapter only)
opportunistic cleanup, doc retirement, or any second deliverable riding this lane

inspect_before_merge: lane source delta confined to: cael-os-light/** (the NEW package root: src, fixtures/phase0/**, package config, README) + docs/handoff/jobs/<this-lane's job dirs>/** + lane-normal goal/lane state ops; ZERO writes to cael.agent.os/** hooks/canon/routing, v3/**, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .os_image.json
no generated boot or registry artifact riding the diff (canon/rails-registry.md untouched)
winning-condition evidence in the lane report: per-condition c01-c13 pass table with per-slice (S1-S6) logs, install-acceptance transcripts for PS and POSIX, and the fixture-manifest presence check
BUILD cooper record attached and valid (builder_verdict clean, court closed, unresolved 0); judge-on-disk closure in-lane before ready
no client data, keys, or secrets anywhere in the diff (synthetic packs only; stub adapter fixtures)
package is self-contained: builds + tests green from the lane worktree with no dependency on factory machinery

out_of_scope: track packs P1-P12 (each fires later via its own RADIO contract from its prepared goal after Kajima re-opens the track; spec section 15 stop-point law)
the reusable client-demo UI (goal-0670 portal shape; FIRST post-Phase-0 deliverable, never Phase-0-core)
signer SERVICE tiers (C4 owner-fork); the cael.os.md compiler pipeline (C5; only the image ENVELOPE freezes here, boot from a FIXTURE image)
pricing/licensing and the npm publish channel decision (deferred behind the section-17 open-core-vs-license fork; install acceptance is local-tarball based)
